button.name: action_create
button.help: Create person and open form to complete all details

button.name: action_create_and_close
button.help: Create person and return to browser

button.name: action_add
button.help: Add organization and open form to complete all details

button.name: action_add_and_close
button.help: Add organization and return to browser

form.p: Use "Add Config Item" to link configuration items to this organization, or "View All" to see and manage all relations in a list view.

form.div: Warning: This will remove the configuration item link from this organization. The configuration item itself will not be deleted.

div.p: Manage role-based proprelations for SAP roles, backend roles, schools and departments.

group.div: SRBR Relations link SAP roles to backend roles. This mapping determines which backend role corresponds to a SAP role.
BRSO Relations link a backend role to a school and department. This determines in which organization persons with a certain role will be created.
Link a SAP Role to a Backend Role.
Link a Backend Role to a School and Department. Persons with this role in this school will be created in the specified department.
Link a Backend Role to this organization. This creates a BRSO relation for person creation.
Add a Backend Role to this organization. This creates a BRSO relation.
Warning: This will rollback changes made by backend tasks. Please review the preview carefully before executing.
Rollback Complete! See the log below for details.

button.name: action_execute_rollback
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to execute this rollback? This action cannot be undone.

group.div: Init Schooljaar creates PPSBR relations for all students in active classgroups for the new schoolyear period.
Update Student Relations fixes existing student PPSBRs so that id_org points to the classgroup (instead of the school). Uses PERSON-TREE placement to determine the correct classgroup per student.

button.name: action_create
button.help: Create persongroup and open form to complete all details

button.name: action_create_and_close
button.help: Create persongroup and return to browser

field.name: remove_member_ids
field.placeholder: Klik en kies leden om te verwijderen…

field.name: add_member_ids
field.placeholder: Klik en kies personen om toe te voegen…

field.name: remove_group_ids
field.placeholder: Klik en kies geneste groepen om te verwijderen…

field.name: add_group_ids
field.placeholder: Klik en kies persongroups om te nesten…

group.div: Recalculate Employee Roles reads each employee's hoofd_ambt (primary assignment), resolves the backend role via SRBR mapping, and creates missing PPSBR relations. Existing roles are not removed.

button.name: action_recalc
button.confirm: This will recalculate roles for all active employees. Continue?

button.name: action_cleanup
button.confirm: This will apply the selected action to all matching records. Continue?

group.div: ⚠ Destructive operation. Deletes sync-managed records so the next Full sync starts from a clean slate. Manual records (automatic_sync=False) and non-classgroup orgs (schools, departments, …) are kept.

button.name: action_reset
button.confirm: This permanently deletes the matching records and all proprelations involving them. This cannot be undone. Continue?
